This is sample test data for YARA rule testing.

hello world
This file contains various patterns that should trigger YARA rules.

Hello World in different case variations.
HELLO WORLD
hello WORLD

Some hex patterns represented as text:
Hello
World
test pattern

Wide string examples:
wide string
TEST

Case insensitive patterns:
CASE INSENSITIVE
case insensitive
Case Insensitive
MiXeD CaSe

Regex patterns:
test123
test456
hello amazing world
hello wonderful world

Complex patterns:
malware detected in system
PE header signature: MZ...
Suspicious activity found
https://example.com/payload
https://malicious.site.net/bad
Exploit attempt detected

Multiple strings for testing:
string1, string2, string3, string4, string5
string6, string7, string8, string9, string10

Performance test triggers:
trigger activated
payload1234
payloadabcd
payloaddeadbeef

Nested condition patterns:
condition1 and condition2
condition3 and condition4
condition1 and condition3
condition2 and condition4

String count tests:
alpha beta gamma
alpha beta gamma delta
alpha alpha beta gamma
gamma gamma delta

Offset-based patterns:
HEADER
... lots of content in between ...
content appears here after offset 100
more content
content again
content once more
FOOTER

End of test data.
